basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Psychologist Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website of Tata Memorial Centre. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC Psychologist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in a relevant field with a mandatory experience of 3 years in the relevant field, including one year of experience in an oncology department. OR Graduate Degree in a relevant field with a mandatory experience of 3 years in the relevant field, including one year of experience in an oncology department.

salary_details.details: Rs. 39,000/- to Rs. 47,000/- p.m. depending on qualification and experience.

selection_process: MCQ Test (if more candidates) Walk-in Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the TMC Psychologist post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the TMC Psychologist post is scheduled for 10 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Psychologist position at TMC?
faq.answer: The salary for the Psychologist position at TMC ranges from Rs. 39,000/- to Rs. 47,000/- per month, depending on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Psychologist role?
faq.answer: Candidates need either a Post Graduate Degree or a Graduate Degree in a relevant field, along with 3 years of experience, including one year in an oncology department.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Psychologist position?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve an MCQ Test if there are many candidates, followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview for the TMC Psychologist recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) office in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract job opportunity at the Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is TMC/AD/89/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Does TMC offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.
